reviews.review_description: I've been waiting for the last story for months did you guys abandon this game ?

developer_response.body: Hello kbasey. Of course not. However, based on user feedback we are trying to move towards interactivity instead of 360 videos. We will keep you posted, and thank you for being a user :)

reviews.review_description: Cartoonish, bad pictures, not like expected. Bad ending. Just a blank screen you dont even know it ended. Not worth a dime.

I really liked this app alot but I wish that there were more stories 
But still keep up the good work👍
